title: MIKKUPPA Jump Leads 3m 800AMP Jumper Cable Professional Car Van Battery Booster Cables, Heavy Duty for 6V, 12V and 24V with Gloves and Storage Bag
features: 🚘 Jump leads set favourable - This Jump leads set is a heavy duty booster cables that you must have to have backup for any unexpected flat battery problems.
🚘 High-quality materials - Fully insulated by tough rubber including the PVC coated clip connectors keep you safe from electricity shock, heat and water.
🚘 Application widely - CE approved,Braided 800 high amperage copper core which capable of applying to 6V, 12V and 24V vehicles and other machines.
🚘 Thickened cables - with 16mm² cross-section for safer use. The thickened cable won't broke easily and can be used for a longer time.

🚘 Fully equipped - With practical gloves and storage bag. The package includes a pair of gloves and a storage bag. The gloves will prevent your hands from getting hurt. After using the jumper cable, you can keep it in the storage bag.
description: Product Description ----STRONG CLAMPS---- The clamps with strong jagged teeth and springs for excellent and strong jaws makes good grip force and connection easy with better conductivity and tension. Suits for various car battery end. ----GOOD PERFORMANCE---- The cable has thick inner core. And it is stays flexible even in very cold weather (-40℃/-40℉). CCA(Copper Coated Aluminum) and pure copper jaw one side for easy electrical conductivity and power transfer. ----PREMIUM PLIABLE CABLE---- Copper clad aluminum cables with an extra thick PVC Cover providing exclusive drop resistance and insulated protection. MIKKUPPA offer you best and durable quality booster cable only.
